meta.title: Recruit Flow Copilot: Your AI Agent to Simplify Recruitment
meta.description: Automate and optimize your hiring process with our AI Agent powered by Microsoft Copilot. Streamline candidate screening, scheduling, and communication for faster recruitment.

items.text: Your AI Agent for Smarter, Faster Recruitment
Instantly screen resumes, auto-create job descriptions, and schedule interviews, all in one click. Integrate with any system to cut time-to-hire and boost quality-of-hire.

items.text: 70% Of The Fortune 500 Now Use Microsoft 365 Copilot
The RecruitFlow Copilot is a specialized, end-to-end Recruitment AI Agent designed for the deep, complex workflows of Talent Acquisition.

headings.text: 70% Of The Fortune 500 Now Use Microsoft 365 Copilot

paragraphs: The RecruitFlow Copilot is a specialized, end-to-end Recruitment AI Agent designed for the deep, complex workflows of Talent Acquisition.

items.text: Uncover the full power of RecruitFlow AI capabilities as it automates every step of the hiring journey, from candidate discovery and screening to engagement and decision support.
Turn a simple job title or a few bullet points into a professional, comprehensive JD instantly.
Effortlessly pull and unify candidate profiles from LinkedIn and major job boards into your central system.
Effortlessly upload resumes from local devices or pull directly from OneDrive and SharePoint.
Advanced deep learning models analyze every resume against specific job requirements, providing an objective Candidate-Job Fit Score to immediately prioritize the best applicants.
Automatically identify suitable interviewers and check their real-time Microsoft 365 calendar availability instantly.
Send invites and book multi-stage interviews directly from the Copilot interface with zero friction.
Maintain professional, timely communication with automated acknowledgment emails, personalized feedback prompts, and timely interview reminders.
Automatically transcribe and summarize every Teams interview, highlighting key candidate competencies and answers to critical questions.
AI analyzes the conversation for candidate engagement and interviewer tone, providing objective insights into the meeting dynamic.
Instantly prompt interviewers to complete structured feedback forms, pre-filled with Copilot-generated summaries for accuracy.
Instantly generate personalized offer letters, contracts, and compensation breakdowns from templates within Word/SharePoint.
RecruitFlow Copilot compiles a personalized onboarding package, pulling relevant company policies, welcome videos, and role-specific training documents from your M365 environment.
Automatically track e-signatures and necessary compliance documents, ensuring a smooth, secure transition to the HRIS/payroll system.

paragraphs: Uncover the full power of RecruitFlow AI capabilities as it automates every step of the hiring journey, from candidate discovery and screening to engagement and decision support.
Turn a simple job title or a few bullet points into a professional, comprehensive JD instantly.
Effortlessly pull and unify candidate profiles from LinkedIn and major job boards into your central system.
Effortlessly upload resumes from local devices or pull directly from OneDrive and SharePoint.
Advanced deep learning models analyze every resume against specific job requirements, providing an objective Candidate-Job Fit Score to immediately prioritize the best applicants.
Automatically identify suitable interviewers and check their real-time Microsoft 365 calendar availability instantly.
Send invites and book multi-stage interviews directly from the Copilot interface with zero friction.
Maintain professional, timely communication with automated acknowledgment emails, personalized feedback prompts, and timely interview reminders.
Automatically transcribe and summarize every Teams interview, highlighting key candidate competencies and answers to critical questions.
AI analyzes the conversation for candidate engagement and interviewer tone, providing objective insights into the meeting dynamic.
Instantly prompt interviewers to complete structured feedback forms, pre-filled with Copilot-generated summaries for accuracy.
Instantly generate personalized offer letters, contracts, and compensation breakdowns from templates within Word/SharePoint.
RecruitFlow Copilot compiles a personalized onboarding package, pulling relevant company policies, welcome videos, and role-specific training documents from your M365 environment.
Automatically track e-signatures and necessary compliance documents, ensuring a smooth, secure transition to the HRIS/payroll system.
